title: adenocalymma cymbalum
intro: Adenocalymma cymbalum, also known as the tamboril, is a species of flowering plant in the family Bignoniaceae. It is native to Brazil and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and fighting against certain infections, and it has been used to treat conditions like fever and respiratory issues. Adenocalymma cymbalum can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its extracts have been studied for potential use in the development of new medications.
